handlers.name: AmmoPouchHandler
handlers.description: Increases max ammo capacity when skills are added or at mission start

methods.name: OnAnySkillAdded
methods.description: Called when any skill is added. Checks if skill uses ammo matching AmmoType, applies ammo bonus.

methods.name: OnMissionStarted
methods.description: Called at mission start. Iterates all active skills and applies ammo bonus to matching ones.

0x58.name: AmmoMultiplier
0x58.description: Multiplier applied to base max ammo (from item template 0xbc)

0x5c.name: MinBonus
0x5c.description: Minimum ammo bonus (used if multiplied value is lower)

0x60.name: AmmoType
0x60.description: Ammo type ID to match against item template (offset 0xec)

0x68.name: SkillFilter
0x68.description: Optional filter to restrict which skills receive the bonus

handlers.name: CauseDefectHandler
handlers.description: Applies random damage effects to actors when defects are caused

methods.name: OnDefectCaused
methods.description: Called when a defect is caused. Applies random damage effect with specified flags.

0x58.name: DefectFlags
0x58.description: Flags passed to Actor.ApplyRandomDamageEffect to control which damage effects can be applied

handlers.name: DestroyPropsHandler
handlers.description: Destroys destructible props within a radius when tiles are hit

methods.name: OnTileHit
methods.signature: void OnTileHit(DestroyPropsHandler this, unknown param2, Skill skill, int hitIndex, int finalIndex, Vector3* position)
methods.description: Called when a tile is hit. If hitIndex == finalIndex and skill matches, triggers prop destruction.

methods.name: DestroyPropsInRadius
methods.signature: static void DestroyPropsInRadius(Vector3* position, float radius)
methods.description: Destroys all DestructibleProp components within sphere radius. Uses OverlapSphereNonAlloc with Collider array.

methods.name: .cctor
methods.description: Static constructor. Initializes Collider[] array with capacity 8 for OverlapSphereNonAlloc.

0x58.name: Radius
0x58.description: Radius for sphere overlap test to find props to destroy

TypeInfo+0xb8.name: ColliderBuffer
TypeInfo+0xb8.description: Pre-allocated array of 8 colliders for OverlapSphereNonAlloc

destruction_logic.description: Calculates destruction delay based on angle from center using cross product with up vector

handlers.name: OverrideVolumeProfileHandler
handlers.description: Overrides post-processing volume profiles based on camera/view mode

methods.name: GetOverrideProfile
methods.description: Returns appropriate volume profile for given mode (0/1=default, 2=sniper, 3=overwatch, other=fallback)

methods.name: OnMissionStarted
methods.description: Sets Actor+0x170 flag to enable volume profile override when skill condition is met

0x58.name: SniperProfile
0x58.description: Volume profile used for sniper/scope mode (mode == 2)

0x60.name: DefaultProfile
0x60.description: Volume profile used for default/aim modes (mode == 0 or 1)

0x68.name: OverwatchProfile
0x68.description: Volume profile used for overwatch mode (mode == 3)

0x70.name: FallbackProfile
0x70.description: Fallback profile used for unknown modes or when specific profile is null

actor_fields_modified.0x170: HasVolumeProfileOverride (bool) - set to true on mission start
